## Northstar Pro License Request

**What features are you most interested in?**
- [ ] Weekly digest (Sunday 7-day rollup)
- [ ] Multi-channel delivery (iMessage + Slack + Telegram simultaneously)

- [ ] Stripe

## What happens next

1. We'll respond to this issue within a few hours (usually much faster)
2. **Payment:** Venmo **@Daveglaser-3** · $49 · note "Northstar Pro"
3. **Key delivery:** We'll email your license key once payment lands
4. **Activate:** `northstar activate YOUR-KEY`

If you prefer to handle this over email directly: **steve.glaser.ops@gmail.com** with subject `Northstar Pro - [your GitHub handle]`

Questions? Comment on this issue or check [INSTALL.md](https://github.com/Daveglaser0823/northstar-skill/blob/main/INSTALL.md).
